Alias.name: View available files
Alias.script:
local packages = wotpack_installer.packages local num_packages = table.size(packages)
table.sort(packages)
local n_cols = 5 local n_rows = math.floor(num_packages / n_cols) + 1
wotpack_installer:echo("Files currently available for installation:
") cecho("----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
") for i=1,n_rows,1 do for j=1,n_cols,1 do local package = packages[(j - 1) * n_rows + i] if package then cechoLink(string.format("%-19s|", package), function() local package = package wotpack_installer:download(package) end, f"Click to install {package} package", true ) end end cecho("
") end cecho("----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
")

Alias.name: Install All
Alias.script:
--syntax: wotpack install all
for _, package in pairs(wotpack_installer.packages) do wotpack_installer:download(package) end

Alias.name: Uninstall All
Alias.script:
--syntax: wotpack uninstall xxx yyy
for _, package in pairs(wotpack_installer.packages) do uninstallPackage(package) wotpack_installer:echo(f"{package} package uninstalled.\n") end

Alias.name: Install
Alias.script:
--syntax: wotpack install xxx
local package = matches[2] package = package:gsub(" ", "_"):lower()
if package ~= "all" then if table.contains(wotpack_installer.packages, package) then wotpack_installer:download(package) else wotpack_installer:echo( f"{package} package not known. View files available for download with \"wotpack view files\"\n", false, true ) end end

Alias.name: Uninstall
Alias.script:
--syntax: wotpack uninstall xxx
local package = matches[2] package = package:gsub(" ", "_"):lower()
if package ~= "all" then if table.contains(wotpack_installer.packages, package) then uninstallPackage(package) wotpack_installer:echo(f"{package} package uninstalled.\n") else wotpack_installer:echo( f"{package} package not known. View files available for download with \"wotpack view files\"\n", false, true ) end end

Alias.name: Change branch
Alias.script:
local branch = matches[2]
wotpack_installer:echo(f"Branch updated from ({wotpack_installer.branch}) to ({branch})\n") wotpack_installer.branch = branch

Script.name: wotpack_installer initializations
Script.script:
wotpack_installer = wotpack_installer or {} wotpack_installer.configs = wotpack_installer.configs or {} wotpack_installer.version = "1.1"
wotpack_installer.user = wotpack_installer.user or "weisluke" wotpack_installer.branch = wotpack_installer.branch or "main"
wotpack_installer.to_download = wotpack_installer.to_download or {} wotpack_installer.to_install = wotpack_installer.to_install or {}
wotpack_installer.packages = { "alt_timer", "char_status_colors", "communications", "containers", "delete_lines", "dice_rolls", "equipment_database", "equipment_trainer", "friend", "gating", "horses", "hp-mv-sp_colors", "lights", "locates", "mapper", "master_mob", "melee_colors", "miscellaneous", "numpad", "pad_input_line", "pk", "player_numbers", "portal_stones", "potion_mixing", "practice_trainer", "rents", "room_highlights", "sort_items", "status_bar", "targeting", "tic_timer", "toggle_logging", "vials", "weapons", "weave_colors", "weave_trainer", "weaving", "wotmud_wiki_search", "wotpack_installer" }
wotpack_installer.help = [[ <cyan>WoTMUD Package Installer Help<reset>
This script allows you to install various things from https://github.com/]]..wotpack_installer.user..[[/WoTMUD Any already installed files with the same name will be uninstalled, so that the newly downloaded ones can be installed.
When inputting file names and types, capitalization does not matter. You may substitute underscores with spaces however, as they will be appropriately filled in as needed.
Commands are as follows:
<yellow>wotpack help<reset> - Display this help file <yellow>wotpack update<reset> - Download and install the latest version of this installer package from github. This will make sure that you have the most up-to-date list of available files <yellow>wotpack install all<reset> - Download and install ALL triggers/aliases/scripts/timers/keys/buttons from github <yellow>wotpack uninstall all<reset> - Uninstalls ALL triggers/aliases/scripts/timers/keys/buttons that were downloaded from github <yellow>wotpack install name<reset> - Downloads and installs any triggers/aliases/scripts/timers/keys/buttons with the given name prefix Example: wotpack install mapper, will install the mapper triggers/aliases/scripts necessary for it to work <yellow>wotpack uninstall name<reset> - Uninstall any triggers/aliases/scripts/timers/keys/buttons with the given name prefix Example: wotpack uninstall mapper
Type <yellow>wotpack view files<reset> to view currently available files
]]

Script.name: wotpack_installer:echo
Script.script:
function wotpack_installer:echo(what, debug, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "<lawn_green>(<forest_green>wotpack_installer<lawn_green>): <white>" local debug_tag = "<deep_sky_blue>(<royal_blue>debug<deep_sky_blue>): <white>" local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if debug message and config debug is false, return without echoing if debug and not self.configs.dbug then return end
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if debug then cecho(debug_tag) end if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: wotpack_installer:download
Script.script:
--assumes package is lowercase and has had any spaces replaced with underscores function wotpack_installer:download(package) local saveto = f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/wotpack_installer_downloads/" if not io.exists(saveto) then lfs.mkdir(saveto) end local file = f"{package}.xml" local url = f"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/{self.user}/WoTMUD/{self.branch}/packages/{file}" saveto = f"{saveto}{file}"
self:echo(f"Downloading updated {package} package...\n") table.insert(self.to_download, package) downloadFile(saveto, url) end

Script.name: wotpack_installer:download_complete
Script.script:
function wotpack_installer:download_complete(event, filename) local _,package = filename:match("(.+)/(.+).xml") if not package then return end -- is the package that downloaded a valid one? if not table.contains(self.packages,package) then return end
table.insert(self.to_install, package) table.remove(self.to_download, table.index_of(self.to_download, package))
if table.is_empty(self.to_download) and not table.is_empty(self.to_install) and not self.is_installing then self.is_installing = true res = coroutine.resume(self.coroutine) end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", "wotpack_installer:download_complete")

Script.name: wotpack_installer.install
Script.script:
function wotpack_installer.install() local self = wotpack_installer
repeat filename = self.to_install[1] local _,fname = filename:match("(.+)/(.+).xml") if table.contains(getPackages(), fname) then uninstallPackage(fname) self:echo(f"Old {fname} uninstalled.
") tempTimer(0.5, function() res=coroutine.resume(wotpack_installer.coroutine) end ) coroutine.yield() end installPackage(filename) self:echo(f"New {fname} successfully installed.
") table.remove(self.to_install, 1) tempTimer(0.5, function() res=coroutine.resume(wotpack_installer.coroutine) end ) coroutine.yield() until table.is_empty(self.to_install) tempTimer(1, function() res=coroutine.resume(wotpack_installer.coroutine) if not res then wotpack_installer.is_installing = false wotpack_installer.coroutine = coroutine.create(wotpack_installer.install) wotpack_installer:echo("Done installing files.
") end end ) end
wotpack_installer.coroutine = wotpack_installer.coroutine or coroutine.create(wotpack_installer.install) wotpack_installer.is_installing = wotpack_installer.is_installing or false
